description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in a matching tracksuit with a front zipper and the letters 'CCCP' prominently displayed on both the chest and back. The figure has a large, rounded head with exaggerated facial features, including a pronounced jaw and ears. The tracksuit fits snugly, with ribbed cuffs at the wrists and ankles, and the figure wears low-profile sneakers. The hands are open and fingers splayed, with arms extended horizontally. The hair is short and neatly styled, and the overall build is athletic but cartoonish. The asset is designed to represent a pedestrian, likely inspired by Soviet-era sportswear.
description: A stylized adult male in a CCCP tracksuit with sneakers, exaggerated facial features, and arms outstretched. The figure has a cartoonish, athletic build and short hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the CCCP logo on the chest, facial features, and full tracksuit details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, ear, and the side seam of the tracksuit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the CCCP logo on the back and the back of the head and tracksuit.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, ear, and the side seam of the tracksuit.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic tracksuit with front zipper and ribbed cuffs
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
